rawAssistant: For poison, you'll need an Antidote. Cold Salve won't help with that kind of affliction, and Shock Tonic won't cure it either. I've got a fresh batch of Antidote on my bench if you'd like to take some for the road. By the way, be careful out there in the marsh – we've had reports of increased poison threats lately.
